title:
Upgraded  $BLAST ↔️ $BLST On Friday 

This Friday, we will launch $BLST in partnership with @mintclu

audit.reason: The provided plan for the upgraded token launch includes a clear step-by-step approach and implementation code, which demonstrates a structured strategy for rectifying previous issues. The smart contract code is concise and adheres to best practices by utilizing OpenZeppelin contracts for security. The focus on reducing the total supply and addressing sniper and bot protection shows attention to critical aspects of tokenomics.
audit.improvements:
1. Include detailed explanations on how the new tokenomics will address previous launch issues, along with expected outcomes.
2. Elaborate on sniper and bot protection strategies and algorithms to provide more robustness to the plan.
3. Add a testing phase plan to ensure the new contract works as intended before full deployment.
4. Include a communication strategy to enhance visibility and trust in the new launch.
5. Provide contingency plans should there be issues with liquidity provision or exchange platform integrations.
